steps.name: source-registry-and-types
steps.summary: Generated a typed sourceRegistry export from docs/ui-vocabulary/sources.md in terms.generated.ts, tightened source id parsing/validation in build and Python validation scripts, regenerated 328-term data, and verified python scripts/validate-ui-vocabulary.py plus npm run build:data.

steps.name: detail-reference-and-copy-ui
steps.summary: Updated term detail drawer to use generated sourceRegistry labels/URLs, show source notes and tier badges, add copyable prompt phrases with copied state, surface anti-use guidance as '이거 말고 다른 경우', and verified build/lint plus Chrome detail smoke for select source/copy UI.

steps.name: confusing-term-data-depth
steps.summary: Added optional related data support and validation, enriched core confusing groups in terms.yml (select/combobox/dropdown, dialog/drawer/sheet, toast/snackbar/alert, tabs/segmented/toggle, checkbox/switch/radio, popover/tooltip), generated typed related data, and verified explicit comparison notes in Chrome.

steps.name: detail-smoke-and-deploy-verification
steps.summary: Ran validation/build/lint, verified local Chrome detail smoke for select/dialog/toast/switch/tabs, pushed implementation commits to ui-dictionary, confirmed Cloudflare deployment success, and verified https://ui.askewly.com/ shows source links, copy controls, explicit related notes, and 328 terms.
